title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Adhoori Pyaas
subTitle: A young woman has a romantic liaison with her paying guest to satisfy her sexual desires, but she soon wants more than mere intimacy.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Daring Mard
subTitle: Aravindan, a young orphan man, gathers a team along with his girlfriend to fight a corrupt system. However, things become complicated when he starts investigating people who wield power.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Sir
subTitle: Amid efforts from bigots to limit schooling, a young teacher joins his father in their family legacy to continue ensuring equal education for all.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Maaligai
subTitle: A female police officer goes to an ancient palace to investigate. However, once she enters the palace, she gets a vision of her past life where she was a fierce and beautiful princess.

title: Loafer - The Hero
subTitle: Raja, a young thief, lives with his father and believes his mother to be dead. However, things become complicated when he comes across Mouni, a runaway girl, and falls for her.

title: Gumnaam
subTitle: An aspiring director reluctantly becomes a police officer. Soon after, he starts investigating a serial murder case wherein the killer targets teenage girls.

title: Jigar
subTitle: Duryodhan, a wrestler, is Raju's friend, but due to a misunderstanding he rapes and kills Raju's sister. Raju later seeks Baba Thakur's help to train in fighting to avenge his sister's death.

title: Khuda Kasam
subTitle: CBI Officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She then attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man, who is imprisoned for a crime he never committed.

title: Bhimaa
subTitle: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

title: Ghost
subTitle: When an inexperienced lawyer chooses to defend a young politician who is accused of murdering his wife, a spirit begins to pursue her.

title: Vidhaata The Suprimo
subTitle: Durga impresses Chandra Sekhar by killing his enemy and helping his wife get well. In reality, he is on a mission to kill Chandra Sekhar's son at the behest of his friend-turned-enemy, Visweswara Rao.

title: Vikram Vetal
subTitle: King Vikramaditya is told twenty-five stories by a ghost, Vetal. He must find a moral lesson in each of these stories.

title: Patel S.I.R.
subTitle: When Subhash Patel, a retired army officer, is confronting a group of drug traffickers, a corrupt lady official resolves to discover the reason for his mission.

subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Thaye Bhuvaneshwari
subTitle: Prema, an ardent devotee of Goddess Soundarya, encounters an evil man, who forces her into submission. However, her belief in the Almighty stands unwavered.

title: Naag Bhoomi
subTitle: A dangerous criminal who traffics women terrorises a village community that ceremoniously worships a serpentine deity. Soon, an archaeologist gets caught up in the ensuing chaos.

title: Karthikeya 2
subTitle: The movie deals with the personal problems of Karthik and how he comes out of them. His pursuit of the truth leads him to find out the power of Indian ancient system and Tatva of Lord Sri Krishna.

title: Encounter Shankar
subTitle: Post his transfer to a village, an encounter specialist sets out to stop a crime boss who wants to build a power plant in the region despite strong public opposition.

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: Python Island
subTitle: A group of explorers set out to search for a magical tree in the jungle and soon find a mysterious creature is waiting to attack them.

title: Python Island
subTitle: A group of explorers set out to search for a magical tree in the jungle and soon find a mysterious creature is waiting to attack them.

title: The Return of Sikander
subTitle: Bullabbai, the president of an island village, wishes to construct a bridge between his village and the mainland. Having waited 20 years for it, he sends his son, Chandu, to investigate the delay.

title: Odiyan
subTitle: Manikyan, a shape-shifting black magician, returns after being exiled for 15 years. However, his presence causes restlessness among the village people who fear him.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Maayon
subTitle: An archaeological team arrives at a historical temple to learn about its secrets. Meanwhile, a group of idol smugglers plan to steal the hidden treasure inside the temple.

title: Badla Naag Ka 3
subTitle: A shape-shifting snake-woman in search of her lover whom she lost two decades ago, sets out to win his love again.

title: Krack
subTitle: When three notorious criminals lock horns with a hot-tempered police officer, Potharaju Shankar, little do they know that they will end up behind bars.

title: Shoorveer
subTitle: Siddharth, a fashion editor who hates horses, decides to venture into the world of horse racing to impress the girl of his dreams.

title: Jawaan
subTitle: Azad fights against the systemic oppression of society. Soon, he finds himself in a web of deceit and crime as he teams up with a group of allies to take down a ruthless arms dealer.

title: Snake
subTitle: A young farm girl, ensnared by a sinister stranger's lies, must wield the truth to rescue her family from impending danger.
